name: hans___md
description: HANS MD WhatsApp bot (Baileys v7 master, CommonJS)

scripts.postinstall: cp -r node_modules/gifted/WAProto/* node_modules/@whiskeysockets/baileys/WAProto/ && sed -i 's/var $protobuf = require("protobufjs\/minimal");/import $protobuf from "protobufjs\/minimal.js";/g' node_modules/@whiskeysockets/baileys/WAProto/index.js && sed -i 's/module.exports = $root;/export const proto = $root.proto; export default $root;/g' node_modules/@whiskeysockets/baileys/WAProto/index.js && node patch.js
